d2e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_a.text: Day 2! Your shop is getting some attention. A new employee candidate just walked in unannounced asking for a job. How do you handle it?

d2e1_b.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_b.text: Hi! I heard your shop is doing well. I have experience in retail and I am a hard worker. Any openings?

choices.text: Hire them on the spot — you need the help
Ask for a resume and schedule a proper interview
Politely decline — you are not ready to hire yet
Ask them to work a free trial day first

d2e1_c_hire.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_c_hire.text: Really?! Thank you so much! I will start right away and give it my all!

d2e1_c_interview.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_c_interview.text: Of course! That is very professional of you. I will send my resume right away.

d2e1_c_decline.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_c_decline.text: Oh, I understand. Good luck with your business! Maybe another time.

d2e1_c_trial.speaker: Candidate
d2e1_c_trial.text: A trial day? Sure, I am confident in my skills. When do I start?

d2e1_result_hire.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_hire.text: Bold but risky! Hiring without screening can lead to mismatches. Always have a process even if simple.

d2e1_result_interview.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_interview.text: Smart move! A proper hiring process protects your business and respects the candidate.

d2e1_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_decline.text: Knowing your limits is wisdom. Hiring before you are ready creates more problems than it solves.

d2e1_result_trial.speaker: Mentor
d2e1_result_trial.text: Creative approach! Trial periods let both sides assess fit before committing. Low risk, high reward.

d2e2_a.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_a.text: Midday! A competitor opened a shop nearby and is offering lower prices. Customers are noticing. What is your response?

d2e2_b.speaker: You
d2e2_b.text: A price war could hurt my margins but doing nothing feels wrong...

choices.text: Focus on quality and service instead of price
Launch a limited time promotion to retain customers
Ignore them and stay the course

d2e2_c_match.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_c_match.text: Oh nice, same price as the new place! But I still prefer coming here honestly.

d2e2_c_quality.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_c_quality.text: I tried the new place but honestly the service here is so much better. Worth every extra peso!

d2e2_c_promo.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_c_promo.text: A promotion? Perfect timing! I was thinking of trying the new place but this keeps me here.

d2e2_c_ignore.speaker: Regular Customer
d2e2_c_ignore.text: Hey, the place next door is cheaper. Are you going to do anything about that?

d2e2_result_match.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_match.text: Price matching is costly and unsustainable long term. Competing on value beats competing on price.

d2e2_result_quality.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_quality.text: Excellent instinct! Differentiation through quality and service is a powerful competitive advantage.

d2e2_result_promo.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_promo.text: Smart tactical move! Short term promotions can retain customers without permanently cutting margins.

d2e2_result_ignore.speaker: Mentor
d2e2_result_ignore.text: Ignoring competition is dangerous. You must always be aware of your market and adapt accordingly.

d2e3_a.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_a.text: Late afternoon. Your best selling item just sold out and a customer really wants it. You could restock overnight for extra cost. What do you do?

d2e3_b.speaker: Customer
d2e3_b.text: I specifically came here for that item. Is there any way you can get it for me?

choices.text: Pay for overnight restock — keep the customer happy
Take their contact and notify when restocked

d2e3_c_restock.speaker: Customer
d2e3_c_restock.text: You would do that for me? That is incredible service! I will wait and tell everyone about this shop!

d2e3_c_alternative.speaker: Customer
d2e3_c_alternative.text: Hmm, it is not exactly what I wanted but it could work. Thank you for not just turning me away.

d2e3_c_notify.speaker: Customer
d2e3_c_notify.text: Oh that is so thoughtful! Yes please, here is my number. I appreciate the personal touch!

d2e3_c_sendaway.speaker: Customer
d2e3_c_sendaway.text: Really? Just like that? I drove all the way here. Very disappointing.

d2e3_result_restock.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_restock.text: Going above and beyond creates loyal customers. The cost was real but so is the word of mouth you just earned.

d2e3_result_alternative.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_alternative.text: Good recovery! Suggesting alternatives shows resourcefulness and keeps the sale alive.

d2e3_result_notify.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_notify.text: Smart relationship building! Following up with customers creates trust and brings them back.

d2e3_result_sendaway.speaker: Mentor
d2e3_result_sendaway.text: A lost customer rarely returns. Even a small gesture of effort leaves a better impression than nothing.
